name: Succubus Adventure
description:
You pissed off a Succubus, and now you live with the consequences

You used to be a normal girl until you had an unfortunate encounter with a Succubus somehow you managed to piss off the succubus enough to make her hit you with the succubus curse, and turn you into a succubus
You can play with or without the level system, it's optional!

I'm not making a MalePov / incubus version of this bot, feel free to steal the code and make one if you want, just give me credit <3
creator: AniSilvy
